props.ChoiceText: You assembled curiosities and evidence until the collection began teaching you as much as any master.
props.ChoiceBio: A growing table of specimens taught you how close study can become possession.

0.TransitionText: Because a growing table of specimens taught you how close study can become possession, the habit of collection and comparison bound you more tightly to learned life.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Scholar, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a growing table of specimens taught you how close study can become possession, hidden correspondences became harder to ignore and curiosity turned occult.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Occultist, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a growing table of specimens taught you how close study can become possession, rare knowledge and cultivated objects gave you distinction that traveled well at court.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Courtier, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a growing table of specimens taught you how close study can become possession, value and exchange stopped feeling separate from study, and trade began to tempt you.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Merchant, but you may remain on your current path instead.
